subcodes.first_line: O attracted handmaid of God! Thy letter was received, and its address was of the utmost sweetness [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای امه الله المنجذبه نامه ات رسید و خطاب در نهایت حلاوت بود زیرا عنوان خطاب
subcodes.subjects: @unity; oneness of humanity, @loving one's enemies; returning hatred with love, @characteristics and conduct of true believers
